description_long: This is a modern wristwatch featuring a vibrant blue strap and a round, dark-colored watch face. The strap appears to be made of a flexible material, likely silicone or rubber, and is secured with a traditional buckle clasp. The watch case is metallic, with a polished finish that contrasts with the matte strap. The dial is dark, possibly black or deep blue, and does not display any visible numerals or markers, giving it a minimalist and sleek appearance. The overall design is sporty and contemporary, suitable for casual or urban wear. No visible branding or decorative elements are present on the dial or strap.
description: A sporty wristwatch with a blue silicone strap and a minimalist, dark round dial in a metallic case. The design is sleek and modern, with no visible branding or markers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue strap, round dark dial, and metallic case; the buckle and strap holes are visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slimness of the watch and the thickness of the strap; the buckle protrudes slightly.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the metallic case and the full length of the blue strap, with the buckle and strap holes clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the thin profile of the watch and strap, with the buckle visible at the bottom.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is minimalist and dark, with no visible numerals, indices, or decorative elements. The style is clean and modern, lacking subdials or textural patterns.
attribute_strap_type: Blue silicone strap with a smooth finish and traditional adjustment holes.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with a plain, dark face and no visible markers or complications.
